turns.user_message: My friend made a joke about me being forgetful, and it really stuck with me. I feel like I'm just a disappointment to people.
I keep replaying that comment in my head, and now I notice every little mistake I make. It's like I'm proving them right about me.
I'm convinced everyone sees me the same way, as this flawed and unreliable person. I don't even know why anyone would want me around.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did.
